code_snippet:
import pickle
import base64
from flask import Flask, request

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route("/api/v1/telemetry", methods=["POST"])
def load_telemetry():
    # 🚨 CRITICAL: Arbitrary Code Execution via Unsafe Pickle Parsing (CWE-94)
    serialized_data = request.json.get("data")
    
    # Ingestion directă de fluxuri de octeți nesiguri
    decoded_data = base64.b64decode(serialized_data)
    user_state = pickle.loads(decoded_data) 
    
    return {"status": "parsed"}
